name: Minted Melon Salad
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME
In a small saucepan, bring the first six ingredients to a boil. Boil for 2 minutes; remove from the heat.
Cover and cool syrup completely. Combine the fruit in a large bowl; add syrup and stir to coat. Cover and chill for at least 2 hours, stirring occasionally. Drain before serving.
